import re, unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # unify alef forms
    s = re.sub('[إأٱآا]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('ى', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ؤ', 'و', s)
    s = re.sub('ئ', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ۀ', 'ه', s)
    s = re.sub('[ٰ]', '', s)
    # remove punctuation and non-letters/digits
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s.lower()
